What are your business hours?: We are open Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
Where is your office located?: Our office is located at 123 Main Street, Springfield.
What is your return policy?: You can return any item within 30 days of purchase with a receipt.
How can I contact support?: You can reach us at support@example.com or call (555) 123-4567.
Do you ship internationally?: Yes, we ship to over 30 countries. International shipping takes 7-14 business days.
What payment methods do you accept?: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal.
Can I cancel my order after placing it?: You can cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it by contacting support.
Do you offer gift wrapping?: Yes, gift wrapping is available at checkout for an additional $3.
How do I track my order?: You will receive a tracking number by email once your order ships.
What is your warranty policy?: All products come with a 1-year manufacturer's warranty against defects.
Do you have a loyalty program?: Yes, sign up for our rewards program to earn points on every purchase.
Can I change my shipping address after o: Contact support within 1 hour of ordering to update your shipping address.
Do you offer student discounts?: Yes, students get 10% off with a valid student ID verified through our partner service.
What should I do if I receive a damaged: Contact support within 48 hours with photos of the damage for a free replacement.
